title: bartlettina liesneri
intro: Bartlettina liesneri, also known as Copalita, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bartlettina liesneri include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
